name: Unpuzzle
author: Poki
description: Unpuzzle is a puzzle game created by Kek Games. Your objective is to remove all the jigsaw pieces in the puzzle until the canvas is fully empty. Click and drag a piece to pull it away and remove it from the puzzle. You can only pull a piece if there isn't any other piece blocking the way. There are multiple unique ways to solve all of these relaxing puzzles. Can you help these pieces Unpuzzle? How to play: Hold and drag a piece to pull it away and remove it from the puzzle. You can only pull a piece if there isn't any other piece blocking the way. Remove every piece to solve the puzzle! About the creator: Unpuzzle was created by Kek Games. Play their other de-stressing puzzle games on Poki: UnpuzzleX and Rhomb
